intro.greeting: Welcome to StreetWise! Two rule-breakers, Dash and Step, need your help to choose safely.
chapters: Intro: A reckless start. Dash speeds through a yellow light while Step crosses looking at his phone.
Chapter 1: The Right of Way. Dash learns why stopping at a stop sign isn't optional.
Chapter 2: The Invisible Pedestrian. Step learns the dangers of walking between parked cars.
Chapter 3: Sharing the Road. Both characters must navigate downtown together.

lessons.stop_sign: Always come to a COMPLETE stop at stop signs. Yield to those with priority.
lessons.phone: Distracted walking is dangerous. Put your phone away before crossing.
lessons.parked_cars: NEVER cross between parked cars. Drivers can't see you!
lessons.yield: Yielding to pedestrians is the law, and it saves lives.

feedback.good: Good job! You followed the rules.
